text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The morning of her debut, Yaeno Muteki
practices some Kongo Yaegaki katas to calm the
flames inside her until the proper time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems to pay off, as her fighting spirit is ignited
just before the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's debut race is finally about to
start!
